title: US California SaaS only
arguments: B2B SaaS product collecting user profile and analytics data for California customers only. No EU users, no PHI, no card processing. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US_CA --industry saas --strict-facts

title: EU fintech provider
arguments: Fintech platform providing account services to EU customers and partnering with EU banks. Processes personal and transaction data. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU --industry fintech --strict-facts

title: Global SaaS EU plus California
arguments: Global SaaS handling customer account data for EU and California users, no healthcare and no direct payment card storage. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU,US_CA --industry saas --strict-facts

title: EU + California SaaS with outsourced payments
arguments: Customer support SaaS serves EU and California users; payment processing is fully outsourced to a third-party processor and no PHI is handled. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU,US_CA --industry saas --strict-facts

title: US federal SaaS without EU users
arguments: US cloud SaaS vendor serves federal civilian agencies only, no EU users, no PHI, and no cardholder data. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US --industry gov-cloud --strict-facts
